comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Completed Ralph boundary/runtime wiring. app.ts now owns the Ralph layer/runtime and passes a shared `runEffect` runner into initRalph, while src/ralph/index.ts no longer creates a local ManagedRuntime. Session actions remain command-owned through boundary callbacks, and the shared-runtime shutdown ordering regression was fixed by registering app disposal after Ralph's session_shutdown handler. Added app-runtime coverage for shutdown ordering and updated Ralph adapter/store/service harnesses to use injected run-effect runtimes. Verified with targeted app/Ralph tests and `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`. Review loop result: spec PASS, quality APPROVED.
